description: Phase 12 - Storage Architecture: Create 6 new storage utility modules with comprehensive tests in artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/
steps: Create directory artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/ for all storage modules

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/contentAddressedStorage.ts - SHA-256 path generation utility. Given a file hash string, generate storage path in format /aa/bb/<full-hash> where aa = first 2 chars, bb = next 2 chars. Methods: generateStoragePath(hash), parseStoragePath(path), validateHash(hash). Pure functions, no side effects. Include hashFile(content: ArrayBuffer) using a simple non-crypto hash (since Web Crypto is async and may not be available in test env, use a deterministic string hash function).
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/contentAddressedStorage.test.ts - Test path generation format, path parsing roundtrip, hash validation, edge cases (short hashes, invalid chars)

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/storageLayout.ts - Define canonical storage structure as typed constants. StorageCategory: originals, previews, tiles, ocr, temp. StorageLayoutConfig: basePath per category, retention policy per category, max size per category. Methods: getPathForCategory(category, filename), getCategoryFromPath(path), getAllCategories(). Export DEFAULT_LAYOUT constant.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/storageLayout.test.ts - Test path generation per category, category detection from paths, default layout values, all categories enumerated

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/deduplicationDetector.ts - Detect duplicate files by comparing SHA-256 hashes. DuplicateMatch: originalId, duplicateId, hash, detectedAt. DeduplicationIndex class: addFile(id, hash), findDuplicate(hash) => string | null, getDuplicateGroups() => Map<hash, id[]>, getStats() => { totalFiles, uniqueFiles, duplicateCount, spaceSaved }. Store index in memory (Map).
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/deduplicationDetector.test.ts - Test duplicate detection, group formation, stats calculation, no false positives on unique files

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/storageTierPolicy.ts - Rules engine for hot/warm/cold tier classification. StorageTier: hot, warm, cold, archive. TierRule: condition function + target tier. TierPolicy class: addRule(rule), classify(file: FileMetadata) => StorageTier. Default rules: accessed in last 7 days = hot, accessed in last 30 days = warm, accessed in last 90 days = cold, older = archive. FileMetadata includes lastAccessedAt, createdAt, accessCount, sizeBytes. Gate behind STORAGE_TIERING feature flag.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/storageTierPolicy.test.ts - Test tier classification based on access recency, custom rules, feature flag gating, edge cases (never accessed)

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/orphanFileDetector.ts - Detect storage files with no corresponding database record. OrphanDetectionResult: orphanPaths[], totalScanned, detectedAt. OrphanDetector class: constructor(knownFileIds: Set<string>), scanPaths(storagePaths: string[]) => OrphanDetectionResult, isOrphan(path: string) => boolean. Extract file ID from storage path using content-addressed format.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/orphanFileDetector.test.ts - Test orphan detection with known vs unknown paths, empty sets, large datasets

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/storageUsageCalculator.ts - Calculate storage usage per category and forecast growth. UsageEntry: category, sizeBytes, fileCount, measuredAt. StorageUsageCalculator class: recordUsage(entry), getCurrentUsage() => UsageEntry[], getTotalSize() => number, forecastGrowth(daysAhead: number) => ForecastResult based on linear regression of historical data points. ForecastResult: projectedSizeBytes, growthRatePerDay, daysUntilLimit(limitBytes).
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/storageUsageCalculator.test.ts - Test usage recording, total calculation, growth forecasting with known data points, days-until-limit calculation
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/storage/index.ts - Barrel export for all storage modules
acceptance_criteria: All 6 storage modules compile without TypeScript errors
All storage tests pass when running: cd artifacts/edms && npx vitest run src/lib/storage/
Storage layout defines all 5 categories with proper paths
Deduplication detector correctly identifies duplicate hashes
Tier policy classifies files based on access patterns with feature flag gating
Orphan detector identifies files without database records
Usage calculator provides growth forecasting based on historical data
